title: lepidium meyeri
intro: Lepidium meyeri, also known as Peruvian cress or garden cress, is a fast-growing annual plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to the Andean regions of South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. Lepidium meyeri has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through various preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
